expect: Fixing turing_test.py doc_ratio bug and adding genesis_extract to boot tier raises TQ from 0.4 to >=0.6
actual: CONFIRMED. TQ 0.4 → 0.6 (3/5 pass, 2 fail). Stored program: 3/5 → 5/5. Bug: doc_ratio regex missed shebang-prefixed files (0.02 measured vs 0.98 real). genesis_extract.py added to CLAUDE.md boot tier reference.
diff: Expected >=0.6, got exactly 0.6. The two remaining failures are genuine: halting_limits (2/1337 lessons acknowledge computational limits — 0.1%) and morphogenesis (D_v/D_u=0.76, need >6). Morphogenesis is structural and likely unfixable without changing the principle-diffusion mechanism.
next_steps: Write lessons explicitly engaging with Gödel/Turing limits to raise halting_awareness to >=10
Consider whether morphogenesis criterion is well-calibrated (D_v/D_u=6 may be too strict for a digital system)
